_comment: The exact CORRUPT gate shape observed in session b7a93ff6, frozen as a HERMETIC fixture.
Numbers 706/707/708 are fixture identifiers ONLY — this file drives an in-process unit with a
faked github layer (tests/smoke/governance/gate-repair-session-b7a93ff6.sh); it never reaches a
real repo, board, or GitHub issue. The live knowledge-engine equivalents are OFF LIMITS per the
plan's global constraints (live repair is a separately authorized follow-up).
The corruption: the Think PR MERGED (the operator's real approval), but the gate was closed
OUTSIDE the guarded dispose door — so it carries no journaled proof, its Stage was never set,
its Status still reads Todo while the issue is CLOSED, and its body never got the idc-gate-pr
marker that BINDS the approval PR to this gate. The pointer is already unblocked (Todo), so no
unblock transition was ever missed — inventing one would be false history.

gate.title: [operator-action] Requirements change - Drive foundation
gate.body: TO APPROVE: merge the Think PR.
